title: Incorrect result for query with 0 >= t0.c0 AND t0.c0 = v0.c0 condition
poc: CREATE VIEW v0(c0) AS SELECT CAST(0 AS INT) FROM t0;
SELECT * FROM t0, v0 WHERE 0 >= t0.c0 AND t0.c0 = v0.c0;
SELECT * FROM t0, v0 WHERE 0 >= t0.c0;
SELECT 0 >= t0.c0 AND t0.c0 = v0.c0 FROM t0, v0;
key_bug_features: Query with 0 >= t0.c0 AND t0.c0 = v0.c0
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 INTEGER, c1 TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE VIEW v0(c0) AS SELECT CAST(c0 AS INTEGER) FROM t0 WHERE c1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM t0, v0 WHERE 0 >= t0.c0 AND t0.c0 = v0.c0;
SELECT 0 >= t0.c0 AND t0.c0 = v0.c0 FROM t0, v0;
